subject: [PATCH v7 04/15] userfaultfd: test uffd VMA flags through the vma_flags_t API

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch updates the userfaultfd kernel module to use the new vma_flags_t API, which provides a single access point for checking VMA flags. The changes are made in the include/linux/userfaultfd_k.h file and affect several functions that check for specific uffd flags. The update is non-functional, as the same bits are being read from the vm_flags union, but it prepares the code for future use of config-gated per-mode masks.
